욥기 9:2.content: “Truly I know that it is so, but how can man be just with God?

욥기 9:3.content: If he is pleased to contend with him, he can’t answer him one time in a thousand.

욥기 9:4.content: God who is wise in heart, and mighty in strength: who has hardened himself against him and prospered?

욥기 9:5.content: He removes the mountains, and they don’t know it, when he overturns them in his anger.

욥기 9:6.content: He shakes the earth out of its place. Its pillars tremble.

욥기 9:7.content: He commands the sun and it doesn’t rise, and seals up the stars.

욥기 9:8.content: He alone stretches out the heavens, and treads on the waves of the sea.

욥기 9:9.content: He makes the Bear, Orion, and the Pleiades, and the rooms of the south.

욥기 9:10.content: He does great things past finding out; yes, marvelous things without number.

욥기 9:11.content: Behold, he goes by me, and I don’t see him. He passes on also, but I don’t perceive him.

욥기 9:12.content: Behold, he snatches away. Who can hinder him? Who will ask him, ‘What are you doing?’

욥기 9:13.content: “God will not withdraw his anger. The helpers of Rahab stoop under him.

욥기 9:14.content: How much less will I answer him, And choose my words to argue with him?

욥기 9:15.content: Though I were righteous, yet I wouldn’t answer him. I would make supplication to my judge.

욥기 9:16.content: If I had called, and he had answered me, yet I wouldn’t believe that he listened to my voice.

욥기 9:17.content: For he breaks me with a storm, and multiplies my wounds without cause.

욥기 9:18.content: He will not allow me to catch my breath, but fills me with bitterness.

욥기 9:19.content: If it is a matter of strength, behold, he is mighty! If of justice, ‘Who,’ says he, ‘will summon me?’

욥기 9:20.content: Though I am righteous, my own mouth will condemn me. Though I am blameless, it will prove me perverse.

욥기 9:21.content: I am blameless. I don’t respect myself. I despise my life.

욥기 9:22.content: “It is all the same. Therefore I say he destroys the blameless and the wicked.

욥기 9:23.content: If the scourge kills suddenly, he will mock at the trial of the innocent.

욥기 9:24.content: The earth is given into the hand of the wicked. He covers the faces of its judges. If not he, then who is it?

욥기 9:25.content: “Now my days are swifter than a runner. They flee away. They see no good.

욥기 9:26.content: They have passed away as the swift ships, as the eagle that swoops on the prey.

욥기 9:27.content: If I say, ‘I will forget my complaint, I will put off my sad face, and cheer up;’

욥기 9:28.content: I am afraid of all my sorrows, I know that you will not hold me innocent.

욥기 9:29.content: I will be condemned. Why then do I labor in vain?

욥기 9:30.content: If I wash myself with snow, and cleanse my hands with lye,

욥기 9:31.content: yet you will plunge me in the ditch. My own clothes will abhor me.

욥기 9:32.content: For he is not a man, as I am, that I should answer him, that we should come together in judgment.

욥기 9:33.content: There is no umpire between us, that might lay his hand on us both.

욥기 9:34.content: Let him take his rod away from me. Let his terror not make me afraid;

욥기 9:35.content: then I would speak, and not fear him, for I am not so in myself.
